title: PM Org Domain Schema Design
objective: Design the minimum org-domain schema required to unblock PM/work write-side adoption by defining the canonical org tables and keys needed for the six deferred org foreign keys without activating those foreign keys, altering PM/work SQL, or implementing runtime code.
required_inputs: Current platform references to clients, sites, business units, and contracts
constrained_outputs: An org-domain schema design handoff note under c:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform/ops/agents/handoffs/
A minimum org schema inventory covering clients, sites, business_units, and contracts
Key/relationship requirements needed to support later FK activation
No FK activation DDL, no PM/work SQL changes, no runtime implementation
validation_steps: Confirm the design starts from the six deferred org FK references identified in packet 011
Confirm clients, sites, business_units, and contracts are defined only to the extent needed for later FK activation and seed-data coverage
Confirm packet 011a does not activate foreign keys, modify PM/work SQL, or implement runtime code
Confirm the org-domain design is sufficient to unblock the Phase 4 write-API lane identified in packets 010 and 011
sql_permission_note: Planning only. Packet 011a does not authorize FK activation, PM/work SQL changes, or runtime implementation.
